title: galium sylvestre var. montanum
intro: Galium sylvestre var. montanum, also known as Alpen-Rosenkruut or alpine bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium sylvestre plant, a flowering plant in the bedstraw family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as supporting digestive and respiratory health. Alpen-Rosenkruut is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and may also be used in salves or ointments for topical application.
